case_title: JOEL YODOWITZ VS. DELTA AIR LINES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YODOWITZ, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES, INC. $4,611.40 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,686.40, DISMISSED AS TO NORTHWEST AS A WHOLLY OWNED SUBSIDIARY OF DELTA WITH PREJUDICE. DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2009 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-16-2009 AT 3:30PM.
